description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist cubic design. The exterior is predominantly white with large, rectangular windows arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, allowing for ample natural light. A covered carport with a sloped roof is attached to one side, and the property features a spacious wooden deck with a swimming pool and a round above-ground hot tub. The backyard area includes outdoor seating and landscaped greenery, while the front is accented by a paved walkway and small ornamental trees. The house has multiple balconies and rooftop access, emphasizing outdoor living and contemporary aesthetics.
description: A modern, cubic multi-story house with flat roofs, large asymmetrical windows, a carport, and a backyard deck featuring a pool and hot tub.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered carport, paved walkway, and ornamental trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport, extensive windows, and the full backyard deck with pool and hot tub.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the wooden deck, swimming pool, hot tub, and outdoor seating area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, hot tub, deck, and the carport with a visible parked car.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a large glass door, paved walkway, and minimal overhang, flanked by small ornamental trees.
